title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for use in LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chat, code highlighting, and dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama’s REST API, supporting chat, generate, and embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models written in Go with conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as GitHub Copilot replacements.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community extension embedding Ollama models into Camunda 8 worker tasks for AI-driven process automation.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to integrate Ollama chat and generate operations into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama server with CUDA or CPU-only setups.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: Nomic’s GPT4All UI now supports Ollama backends, letting users switch between local GGUF engines seamlessly.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama and demonstrates streaming responses.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama chat and embeddings to MCP clients like Claude Desktop.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by any Ollama model.
